title: juncus supinus subsp. uliginosus
intro: Juncus supinus subsp. uliginosus, a subspecies of the Juncus supinus plant, is a type of rush that belongs to the family Juncaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Juncus supinus subsp. uliginosus include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce swelling and pain, and alleviate symptoms of hypertension and diabetes. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are often used to treat a variety of health issues.
